company.name: Acme Capital Tools
company.description: Acme Capital Tools builds embedded finance and treasury automation software for mid-market B2B companies. We help finance teams automate AR/AP, cash forecasting, and reconciliation across multiple banks and ERPs.

product.name: Acme Treasury OS
product.description: An AI-native treasury management platform that consolidates bank balances, automates reconciliation, forecasts 13-week cash flow, and gives controllers a single approval workflow for payments across entities.
